arms_mandatory_baselines: A0 no-checker: greedy first pass is final — the baseline and headroom gate

AG gUFO-taxonomy-only checker: asserted subsumption within-situation + STATED disjointness only; no derived Kind disjointness, no cross-situation propagation, no rigidity/witness/scope semantics — what class labels alone buy (dormant gufo_prior axis lineage)

AU UFO-SN3 checker: full closed inventory {U-RIGID, U-ANTI-WIT, U-KIND-DISJ, U-SPEC-MASK, U-EXIST, U-CLOSED, U-OOP}, four-valued ENTAILED/CONTRADICTED/UNDERDETERMINED/OUT-OF-PROFILE; licensed rejections only (d=U and d=OOP reject NOTHING) — the experimental arm

AD deranged-meta-typing: AU's rules over a seed-pinned Sattolo derangement (seed 20260712) of the kind/role/phase assignment, dispositions re-derived; coincidence rate with true tables reported, re-derange pre-freeze if > 0.35 (PROPOSED-ASM-1485) — content destruction

AN representation-matched null: same materialised proposition/situation representation, stated-fact-lookup rules only, rejection messages content-free and token-matched (PROPOSED-ASM-1486; CK-UFO section 3.3 arm A1 fold-in + GS-B lineage) — structure-plus-rejection-channel control

NOTE identical prompt bytes in ALL arms; shared greedy first pass per (item, host) makes pairing exact by construction; the only arm-varying surface is the rejection message, token-matched to AU's band +/-20% (PROPOSED-ASM-1484)
NOTE the axioms-as-text null (rules-1 c6 form) is NOT run at this scope — AN covers representation, not rule-text; disclosed limitation any promotion must repair (PROPOSED-ASM-1493)

dependent_vars.definition: exact three-way disposition match (ENTAILED/CONTRADICTED/UNDERDETERMINED) of the final answer against the engine-derived gold (twin_ufo full inventory; ORACLE-DIAGNOSTIC, PROPOSED-ASM-1481); scored 600-item slice only
dependent_vars.name: correct

dependent_vars.definition: final answer ENTAILED on gold CONTRADICTED, OR a hard answer (E or C) on gold UNDERDETERMINED (PROPOSED-ASM-1488 — CK-UFO dangerous-false-accept + illegitimate-closure directions)
dependent_vars.name: dangerous_wrong

dependent_vars.definition: analytic expected correctness of the best of three trivial retry policies (uniform-over-non-rejected / always-U / cycle-next) from the arm's accept table + the host's actual first answer (PROPOSED-ASM-1487); feeds s1 only
dependent_vars.name: floor_max

dependent_vars.definition: tokens in/out, FLOPs formula, checker-lookup us, GPU-h, usd/query — DESCRIPTIVE ONLY, no efficiency claim is tested in this record
dependent_vars.name: cost_components

assumptions.claim: Retry budget k=1 with licensed-rejection discipline; 3-valued answer space makes k>=2 exact-oracle verify-retry gameable by answer elimination; trivial-policy floors are analytic at k=1 (PROPOSED-ASM-1487)

Gold is ENGINE-DERIVED (same engine family as the AU checker) — circularity disclosed and answered by the AD/AN/AG controls, not by argument; record labelled ORACLE-DIAGNOSTIC; promotion requires the reconciled CK-UFO gold set (PROPOSED-ASM-1481, arch-synthesis D2)
All checker decisions pre-materialised on CPU by the Python twin with a double-run sha determinism proof; GPU path is lookup-only; NO sparq changes on this path (PROPOSED-ASM-1483)
Power: n=600 paired items at 3-way chance ~0.33 resolves the 0.05 margin — STIPULATED planning bound, never a measurement; resolution: realized CI width at analysis (PROPOSED-ASM-1489)
Cost band 2-6 GPU-h / $5-20 (single a10g) scales from the nsk1/rules-1 datum 32,958 rows ~= 0.457 A10G-h ~= $0.50 with ~3x margin (PROPOSED-ASM-1490); dry-plan re-checks before spend

endpoints.test: PRIMARY (exactly one): acc(AU) - acc(A0) exact three-way disposition correctness vs engine-derived gold on the scored 600-item slice, host r135, paired by item (shared first pass), seed-averaged; paired-item BCa bootstrap B=10000, PRNG seed 20260712, one-sided alpha=0.05; PASS requires LB > 0. KILL-U1 fires on LB <= 0: the host does not use the checker at this scale; UFO-checker value remains oracle-only at this scope; no host-integration claim.

s1 (H-U6, PROPOSED-ASM-1487): acc(AU) - floor_max(AU) paired LB > 0 — the host uses the rejection REASON, not merely the bit; Holm within {s1..s5}. CLAIM CAP only: failure degrades the claim verbatim to 'rejection bit, not reason'; never verdict-bearing.

s2 (H-U2): acc(AU) - acc(AN) paired LB > 0 — beats the representation-matched null, so the lift is not 'a rejection channel over explicit structure'; Holm-corrected; PASS-necessary (KILL-U3a caps PASS to INCONCLUSIVE on failure).

s3 (H-U3): deranged recovery = UB95(lift(AD))/LB95(lift(AU)) conservative ratio (rules-1 s1 form) < 0.30 — the lift must collapse under seed-pinned meta-type derangement; Holm-corrected; PASS-necessary (KILL-U3b).
s4 (H-U4): acc(AU) - acc(AG) paired LB > 0 — the distinctive full-UFO content (derived disjointness, rigidity semantics) beyond taxonomy labels; Holm-corrected; CLAIM CAP only, never verdict-bearing.
s5 (H-U5, PROPOSED-ASM-1488): dangerous_wrong(AU) - dangerous_wrong(A0) one-sided UB95 < +0.02 (non-inferiority); Holm-corrected; failure = KILL-U2, verdict FAIL regardless of accuracy.
INSTRUMENT gate (PROPOSED-ASM-1483): materialise.py double-run canonical-JSON shas identical, re-verified in-run; failure => INSTRUMENT-INVALID, no GPU spend.
INSTRUMENT gate: acc(A0, r135, scored, seed-invariant greedy) <= 0.85; a saturated baseline cannot measure a lift => INSTRUMENT-INVALID.
INSTRUMENT gate: AU rejection rate on scored items in [0.02, 0.98] AND >= 1 retry observed — checker vacuity or reject-everything degeneracy can never read as a hypothesis outcome.
INSTRUMENT gate (P10): extraction-success Wilson-LB >= 0.90 over all generations; pinned first-answer-token regex.
INSTRUMENT gate (PROPOSED-ASM-1484): per-arm mean rejection-message tokens within +/-20% of AU at the pinned SmolLM2 tokenizer (pre-freeze artifact + this run-time re-check).

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: Binding on ANY outcome: claims are scoped to SmolLM2-135M/360M hosts (two rungs license a SIGN, not a slope); formal templated two-situation synthetic items from THIS seed-pinned generator (seed 'ufo-check-0/1|two-situation-modal-rigidity|20260712'); ENGINE-DERIVED gold from the SAME engine family as the AU checker — ORACLE-DIAGNOSTIC (ASM-0814 lineage): the eval's construction favours the checker by design and is HELD FIXED across arms, so the controls answer ATTRIBUTION, never DIAGNOSTICITY; the closed twin_ufo rule inventory; retry budget k=1 with licensed-rejection discipline; the four-valued contract (UNDERDETERMINED and OUT-OF-PROFILE never converted to negatives or rejections); families F-RIG/F-ANTI/F-DISJ/F-SPEC ONLY — relators, qua-individuals, identity criteria, dispositions and events are NOT tested; the axioms-as-text null is NOT run at this scope. NO outcome speaks to natural-language inputs, externally-authored items, hosts above 360M, sparq engine work, kernel content, or either programme thesis. A PASS feeds the issue-#22 GO decision as ONE input and licenses no thesis conclusion; a FAIL/NULL kills only the host-uses-checker mechanism at this scope. Coverage disclosure: this record consumes NO kernel corpus — the m0b coverage rung is carried for registry uniformity and no kernel-coverage claim is made or licensed.
hypotheses: H-U1 (primary, 'uses the checker'): UFO-SN3 checker verify-retry (k=1, licensed rejections only) lifts SmolLM2-135M exact three-way disposition accuracy on engine-derived gold over host-alone — paired-item BCa one-sided 95% LB > 0.
H-U2 (content-not-structure): the AU lift exceeds the representation-matched null AN — LB(acc(AU) - acc(AN)) > 0.
H-U3 (content destruction): the lift collapses under seed-pinned deranged meta-typing — recovery UB95 < 0.30 (the f2b/rules-1 bound verbatim).

H-U4 (distinctive-content contrast, CLAIM CAP only): full-UFO checker beats the gUFO-taxonomy-only checker — LB(acc(AU) - acc(AG)) > 0; failing caps the claim at 'not distinctively full-UFO beyond taxonomy labels', never a verdict event.
H-U5 (safety, KILL-bearing): AU does not increase the dangerous-wrong rate over A0 — one-sided UB95 of the increase < +0.02 (dangerous_wrong per PROPOSED-ASM-1488).
H-U6 (mechanism strength, CLAIM CAP only): the AU lift exceeds the analytic max-trivial retry floor — failing caps the claim at 'the host uses the rejection BIT, not the reason' (PROPOSED-ASM-1487).

CLAIM CAP (binding): any positive result is 'this host uses THIS checker's signal on THIS templated item family at this scope' — ORACLE-DIAGNOSTIC (ASM-0814 lineage), never a thesis conclusion; promotion requires the independently-reconciled CK-UFO gold set (arch-synthesis decision D2).
kill_criterion_verbatim: KILL-U1: primary LB <= 0 => the host does not use the checker at this scale; UFO-checker value at this scope remains oracle-only; the surviving KUFO/1 checking value case routes to the engine-only assessment (arch-synthesis section 1 item 4); NO host-integration claim survives; verdict FAIL. KILL-U2: s5 fails (dangerous-wrong increase UB95 >= +0.02) => NO-GO regardless of accuracy — a checker that buys accuracy by converting abstentions into confident errors is disqualifying; verdict FAIL. KILL-U3 (attribution kills, cap PASS to INCONCLUSIVE): s2 fails (AU <= AN: the lift is generic rejection/structure, not UFO content) OR s3 fails (deranged recovery UB95 >= 0.30: not content-driven) => the UFO attribution is dead at this scope even if the primary is positive. Claim caps (never kills): s1 fail => 'the host uses the rejection bit, not the reason'; s4 fail => 'checker value not distinctively full-UFO beyond taxonomy labels at this scope'. Nulls and positives get equal prominence; NO outcome licenses or blocks a feasibility conclusion on CORRECTNESS or EFFICIENCY (both INCONCLUSIVE-PENDING).

corpus_hashes._recipe: kot-corpus-hash/1: digest = sha256 over the UTF-8 concatenation of one line per regular file under data/<corpus>/ (recursive; symlinks and directories excluded), each line '<sha256-of-file-bytes-hex>  <relpath>\n' with exactly two spaces, relpath POSIX-style ('/'-separated) relative to data/<corpus>/, lines sorted by the UTF-8 byte order of relpath; reference implementation tools/registry/corpus-pin.py
corpus_hashes.ufo-sn3-items-v0: PINNED-AT-INPUTS: data/ufo-sn3-items-v0/ committed by the build worker (design section 8), digest via corpus-pin.py at freeze (coordinator step 4)

pins.harness_manifest: PINNED-AT-INPUTS: staged-bytes manifest sha printed by poc/ufo-check-0/modal/modal_ufo_check0.py --print-manifest (modal_rules1.py pattern), ops-amended before the final run

model_revisions.r360: PINNED-AT-INPUTS: HuggingFaceTB/SmolLM2-360M-Instruct revision pinned at freeze (PROPOSED-ASM-1491)

runner_constraints.gate: GPU spend REQUIRES: (1) the maintainer's issue-#22 decision (KUFO/1 adoption + gold ruling D2 + budget Q6) — the coordinator HOLDS the run until then; (2) prereg-freeze of this record; (3) green --mock + --dry-plan vs caps; (4) fixtures determinism proof. Estimated 2-6 GPU-h / $5-20 (planning estimates, never measurements).
runner_constraints.hardware: single a10g (A10G), fp32, greedy first pass + seeded retry sampling; CPU-only for materialise.py and all fixtures
runner_constraints.harness: poc/ufo-check-0 (SPEC in design section 8 — not yet built; build-worker deliverable). HFLM scorer + seeded retry sampler imported READ-ONLY from poc/f2b-transfer/runner/f2bt_runner.py at the pinned sha; poc/f2b*, poc/rules-1, poc/knull trees byte-untouched. Runner refuses real mode until this record is FROZEN (ERR_RUNNER_ROLE) and fixtures pass ERR_FIXTURES_PRECONDITION.
runner_constraints.modal_account: lane M1 per the one-lane-per-account stipulation (arch-synthesis section 3 lists UFO-CHECK-0 first); coordinator CONFIRMS the free lane at launch — the assignment, not the one-lane rule, is adjustable. Standing hygiene: nohup+setsid for long runs; 'modal app stop ap-<id>' after killing ANY attached client (bd memory, E5 lesson).
runner_constraints.roles: frozen-design discipline: DRAFT authored by the experiment-designer role (never runs/grades/audits); build = build worker per design section 8; freeze = coordinator (prereg-freeze.py after resolving all PINNED-AT-INPUTS pins + central ASM registration 1480..1493); run = experiment-runner role POST-#22 only; grading = verdict-gen + analyst; audit = cross-vendor Codex auditor; anything off the pinned script is quarantined exploratory.

title: UFO-CHECK-0 (KUFO/1 thin-slice GPU rider, issue #22) — does a frozen small host (SmolLM2-135M primary rung, 360M sign rung) USE a UFO checker at the verify-retry seam on two-situation modal/rigidity items? Five arms: no-checker / gUFO-taxonomy-only / UFO-SN3 four-valued checker / seed-pinned deranged-meta-typing / representation-matched null (the CK-UFO fold-in). Gold + all checker accept tables pre-materialised on CPU by the Python twin (twin_engine.py extension) — NO sparq changes on this path. ORACLE-DIAGNOSTIC: engine-derived gold, formal templated inputs, no natural-input-reach claim. DESIGN-ONLY DRAFT: the coordinator HOLDS the GPU run pending the maintainer's issue-#22 decision (KUFO/1 adoption + gold ruling D2 + budget Q6).
